html:
Exclusive to:  

The Fashion Melon is a wearable Dress Item in the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 1 Watermelon and 3 Twigs to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

It grants 120 points of protection from Overheating, provides a cooling effect of 55°, and will drain the player's Sanity by 2 points per minute. Despite providing some protection from Rain, the Fashion Melon will gradually increase the player's Wetness up to a maximum of 33. The Fashion Melon does not have a durability, but instead rots after 3 days, similar to the Ham Bat, Garland, and Ice Cube.

Wearing the Fashion Melon while playing with WX-78 will cause the player to take damage periodically.

Bugs

  • Due to the way the game is coded, the Fashion Melon also prevents freezing during Winter. This won't happen in Don't Starve Together.

Trivia

  • The Fashion Melon was first revealed in the A Feet Of Strength trailer for the Reign Of Giants March 12, 2014 beta.

Gallery

  • Fashion Melon Equipped
  • Wilson wearing a Fashion Melon.
  • Willow wearing a Fashion Melon.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Fashion Melon.

"watermelonhat"
“Let the juice run down your face.”
–Wilson
“Well, that's one use for this fruit.”
–Willow
“Why not wear melon on head! Haha!”
–Wolfgang
“It's sticky on my head. Yuck.”
–Wendy
“HAT SEEMS INCOMPATIBLE WITH MY FUNCTION”
–WX-78
“That's certainly one thing you could do with a watermelon.”
–Wickerbottom
“You can call me Mr. Melon.”
–Woodie
“This is one way to keep cool. And sticky.”
–Maxwell
“It's sticky and made with sticks. Fascinating!”
–Wagstaff
“It's almöst like wearing a pelt.”
–Wigfrid
“This is the best idea we have ever had.”
–Webber
“Next best thing to a watermelon bikini.”
–Walani
“Aaaahhhhhh sweet relief...”
–Warly
“I love me water fruits but this be ridiculous.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HEAD BE STICKY”
–Wilba
“Watery head thing”
–Wormwood
“Admit it. I look good in this.”
–Wheeler
“A melon for your melon.”
–Winona
“Sticky horns await.”
–Wortox
“Think me like fa-shun, florp!”
–Wurt
“This feels silly...”
–Walter
“Believe it or not, it's actually quite practical.”
–Wanda
The Fashion Melon is a wearable Dress Item in the Reign of Giants DLC. It requires 1 Watermelon and 3 Twigs to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.
It grants 120 points of protection from Overheating, provides a cooling effect of 55°, and will drain the player's Sanity by 2 points per minute. Despite providing some protection from Rain, the Fashion Melon will gradually increase the player's Wetness up to a maximum of 33. The Fashion Melon does not have a durability, but instead rots after 3 days, similar to the Ham Bat, Garland, and Ice Cube.
Wearing the Fashion Melon while playing with WX-78 will cause the player to take damage periodically.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
Due to the way the game is coded, the Fashion Melon also prevents freezing during Winter. This won't happen in Don't Starve Together.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Fashion Melon was first revealed in the A Feet Of Strength trailer for the Reign Of Giants March 12, 2014 beta.
